mapper.insert: INSERT INTO tag (tag_name, tag_type, category_id, status, deleted, create_time, update_time) VALUES (#{tagName}, #{tagType}, #{categoryId}, #{status}, 0, NOW(), NOW())
mapper.update: UPDATE tag SET tag_name = #{tagName}, tag_type = #{tagType}, category_id = #{categoryId}, status = #{status}, update_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM tag WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = 0
SELECT * FROM tag WHERE tag_name = #{name} AND deleted = 0
SELECT * FROM tag WHERE deleted = 0 ORDER BY id DESC
mapper.update: UPDATE tag SET update_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
